titleStmt.title: SII 37.325: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 325. (A.R. No. B 432 of 1940-41.) Eṟṟaguḍi, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Boulder near the temple of Hanumān.
This is dated Śaka 1470, Kīlaka, Vaiśākha śu. 2, corresponding to 1548 A.D. April 10, Tuesday.

It registers the grant of the village Yaraguḍi by mahāmaṇḍlēśvara Nārayadēva-Mahārāju, son of Nandēla Narasiṅgayadēva-mahārāju for providing food offerings to the god Ahōbala Narasiṁha. It also gives the boundaries of the village in detail.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 196.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svasti śrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāha
naśakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1470 Agunēṭikīlaka saṁvatsara vaiśā
kha śu 2 lu śrīmamahārājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrasadāśivadēva mahārāyalu
vidyānagaramaṁdu vajra siṁhāsanā
rūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivi sāmrājyaṁ jēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrī
ma cetu¨rbhuvanādhīśvara śrī Ahōbala nṛsiṁhvu
ni divyaśrīpādapadmaṁbulaku svāmi dāsānudāsulu
sōmavaṁśamaṁdu Ātrēyagōtra Āpastaṁbha sūtrulaina
śrī¨rmamahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdēla narasiṁgaya dēvamahā
rājula putṛlaina nārayadēva mahārājulu Anaṁtamu
laina daṁḍamulu sama¨rpiṁci yicina bhūdāna dhammaśāsa
nakramameṭlaṁnnanu śrī sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu māku nā
yaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina [ ti]lōnu tāḷlapodaṭūriki vā
yuvyayaṁ saṁkīpalleku tū¨rpu yarajarlaku Āgnēyaṁ
riki nairuti nāgamaḷadiṁneku yīśānyaṁ
peṁnadarini dēvaragrāmaṁ yaraguḍi
dēvatā bhōgamunaku Āsapaḍi yaraguḍi tiru
[ ] ruce rācuvāḍu Āliki ḍu
guṁḍu
va dhyāna tirunāḷakuṁnnuvu
yāla tirunāḷakuṁnnu
vaḍalu vaḍikiṁni Ācaṁdrāka
sthāyigānu sama¨rpiṁstimi . svadattā dvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svada
ttaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . yī grāmāna
ku yavaru ganaka dōṣadrōhulu
talaṁcinānu dēvatā drōhu Ā
drōhulu vāraṇāsilōnu tama talli
taṁḍrādulanuṁnnu gōbrāṁhmaṇula
nuṁnnu vadhiṁcina pāpānapōvuvāru
Ani vēyiṁcina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 37.325 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
